samples.name: Smoke run (Books sandbox)
samples.prompt: Login to Books sandbox. Verify dashboard loads, menus open, and report pages render without console errors. Do not create dummy data. Run as smoke check.

samples.name: Full functional run (Books sandbox)
samples.prompt: Run a full functional QA on Books sandbox. Create deterministic ledgers, items, sales/purchase vouchers, payments, receipts. Open ledger, registers, GST reports, trial balance, P&L and balance sheet. Verify all totals against expected results. Capture screenshots, trace, console and network.

samples.name: GST reconciliation only (Books sandbox)
samples.prompt: Focus on GST. Create sales and purchase vouchers, then validate GSTR-1, GSTR-3B and HSN summary against expected output/input GST. Skip permission and keyboard sessions.

samples.name: Production basic check (any product)
samples.prompt: Login only. Confirm dashboard loads, menus open, reports pages render. Do not create dummy data. Report console errors and failed API calls.
